pr.title: bump version and update changelog
pr.body:
### Related Issue

**Issue:** #XXXX

### Description

Bumps the VS Code extension package version to `3.85.0` and updates `CHANGELOG.md` with the release notes for changes since `v3.84.0`.

### Test Procedure

- Verified `package.json` and `package-lock.json` report `3.85.0`.
- Ran `git diff --check`.

### Type of Change

-   [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
-   [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
-   [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
-   [ ] ♻️ Refactor Changes
-   [ ] 💅 Cosmetic Changes
-   [x] 📚 Documentation update
-   [ ] 🏃 Workflow Changes

### Pre-flight Checklist

-   [x] Changes are limited to a single feature, bugfix or chore (split larger changes into separate PRs)
-   [ ] Tests are passing (`npm test`) and code is formatted and linted (`npm run format && npm run lint`)
-   [x] I have reviewed [contributor guidelines](https://github.com/cline/cline/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

### Screenshots

N/A

### Additional Notes

Release-only changelog and version bump, matching the prior `3.84.0` release PR shape.
pr.author: arafatkatze
